hero.label: Industries
hero.title: Recycled Fibers for Every Industry
hero.description: Our processed fibers serve manufacturers across a wide range of sectors, providing sustainable, cost-effective alternatives to virgin materials.

sectionHeader.label: Markets We Serve
sectionHeader.title: Trusted Across Sectors
sectionHeader.description: From the cars you drive to the buildings you work in, recycled fibers from Fiber Conversion are already part of everyday life.

items.label: Automotive
items.title: Automotive Manufacturing
items.description: The automotive industry is one of the largest consumers of recycled textile fibers. Our processed fibers are used in a wide range of vehicle components, helping manufacturers meet both cost and sustainability targets.

items.label: Construction
items.title: Building & Insulation
items.description: Recycled textile fibers are increasingly used in building insulation products, offering excellent thermal and acoustic properties while diverting waste from landfills. Our fibers help create greener buildings.

items.label: Home Goods
items.title: Furniture & Bedding
items.description: From mattress padding to sofa cushions, recycled fibers provide the comfort and resilience that furniture and bedding manufacturers need, at a fraction of the cost and environmental impact of virgin materials.
applications: Pillow fill and decorative cushion fibers

items.label: Technical Textiles
items.title: Nonwovens & Geotextiles
items.description: The nonwovens industry relies on consistent, quality fiber inputs. We supply processed fibers for a range of technical textile applications where performance and reliability are critical.
applications: Geotextile fabrics for erosion control and soil stabilization
Filtration media for air and liquid applications

items.label: Pulp & Paper
items.title: Paper & Specialty Products
items.shortDescription: Fiber feedstock for specialty paper products
items.description: Cotton and other natural fiber waste can be recycled into feedstock for specialty paper products. We supply clean, processed fiber for paper mills and specialty product manufacturers.
applications: Cotton linter fiber for specialty papers
Fine stationery and art paper fibers

items.label: General Industrial
items.title: Industrial & Commercial Applications
items.description: Beyond specific sectors, recycled fibers find use in dozens of industrial and commercial applications. If your process uses fiber, chances are we can supply a recycled alternative.

ctaBanner.title: Don't See Your Industry?
ctaBanner.description: We work with manufacturers across many sectors. If you use fibers in your process, we can likely help. Let's talk.
